summary: Re-verified iter27 fixes. Both bugs fully resolved. Focused refix test file (6 tests) + full iter27 suite (17 tests) = 23/23 passing.
critical_code_review_comments: Fix 1 verified: list_expenses now uses try/except int() parse then max(1, min(limit_val, 2000)). limit=0→1, limit=99999→2000, limit=-5→1, limit=abc→422 (FastAPI type validation).

Fix 2 verified: _send_ping now calls `if await _ping_already_sent(...): return` before tg_send. Second call with same (user_id, type, dedup_key) is a silent no-op; two calls with different dedup_keys still send both.
test_credentials: Bearer test_session_karya1 (user test-user-karya1, DB karya_db_v2). Unchanged from iter27.
seed_data_creation: None persistent. Refix tests write+cleanup TEST_REFIX_DEDUP_* rows in db.ping_log (field name is `day`, not `day_key`).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Both iter27 bugs are fixed. Note: db.ping_log uses field `day` (not `day_key`) as the dedup key column — first version of the refix test cleaned by `day_key` and failed silently because leftover rows collided. Motor is bound to the pytest event loop, so use `asyncio.get_event_loop().run_until_complete(...)` — NOT `asyncio.run(...)` — for direct helper calls in tests.
rca of the issue: Not applicable — both iter27 bugs already fixed by main agent; this iteration is verification-only.
